titleStmt.title: SII 32, appendix, no. 3: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 3. (A.R. No. B of 2008-09.) TIRUCHCHENDUṞAI, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the jagati (south), ardhamaṇḍapa, Chandraśēkhara temple.

This inscription is found engraved in continuation of the last inscription. It seems to be connected with it. The style of writing of both the records is similar. It records that the paruḍai (brāhmaṇical assembly) granted land to the god of the stone temple, as dēvadāna and agreed to protect the land from taxes such as echchōṟu, veṭṭi and iṟai. It also states that Naṅgai Bhūti Āditta Piḍāri, who had built the stone temple at Tiruchchenduṟai, gave one hundred kaḻañju of gold to reclaim this half vēli and 1/8 mā of land and converted it into a field, called Piṉṉāmaḻaivayakkal and agreed to provide food offerings to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kaṟṟaḷiy perumāṉaṭikaḷukku tevatāṉamāka niroṭu Aṭṭik kuṭuttom paruṭaiom Iṟaiyum Eccoṟu veṭṭiyum kulaiyum maṟṟum Epper paṭṭatu nā
ṅkaḷey kāttu kuṭuppomāṉom paruṭaiyom Inilattai naṅkai pūti Ātitta piṭāriyeṉ tirucceṉtuṟai nāṉ Eṭuppi
tta kaṟṟaḷi perumāṉa(ṉa)ṭika(ḷ)ḷukku yi nilattiṉai nūṟṟu kaḻaiñcu poṉ kuṭuttu kalli ceyiyākki piṉṉāmaḻai vayakkaleṉṟu
per yiṭṭu Araiye Araikkāl ceyiyum yi nilam Uḻuvār patteṭṭu kuttal paḻavarici tiruvamitukku Aṭṭuvitāka tiruceṉtuṟai
perumā(ṉa)ṉaṭika(ḷ)ḷukku pūti Ātitta piṭāri yeṉ niroṭu Aṭṭi kuṭutteṉ Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 32, appendix, no. 3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
